globalNews.title: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
globalNews.summary: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.

globalNews.title: Father-of-eight killed in San Diego mosque shooting hailed as hero
globalNews.summary: Security guard Amin Abdullah, one of three killed in the attack, was described as "a shining light".

globalNews.title: Victim or enabler? Epstein girlfriend who could face questions despite plea deal
globalNews.summary: Nadia Marcinko is relatively unknown but may soon be called before US legislators.

globalNews.title: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff
globalNews.summary: Isak, 71, died in December 2024 after falling from a ravine while walking in the Montserrat mountains near Barcelona.

globalNews.title: Selling children to survive: Afghan fathers forced to make impossible choices
globalNews.summary: In Afghanistan today, a staggering three in four people cannot meet their basic needs.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
cryptoNews.summary: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."

cryptoNews.title: A viral hedgehog, Vitalik Buterin, and a bow: the GraphDex launch that crypto won't forget
cryptoNews.summary: 5,800 users in two hours. One QR code. One bow that went viral.

cryptoNews.title: Tor Project to lead Web3 crowdfunding to support internet freedom
cryptoNews.summary: Global internet freedom has declined for 15 consecutive years, with more countries restricting access to more of the internet, according to Freedom House.

cryptoNews.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
cryptoNews.summary: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
cryptoNews.summary: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.

aiNews.title: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic’s pre-training team
aiNews.summary: Pre-training is responsible for the large-scale training runs that give Claude its core knowledge and capabilities, according to the company. It's also one of the most expensive, compute-intensive pha

aiNews.title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
aiNews.summary: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

aiNews.title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
aiNews.summary: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries d

aiNews.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
aiNews.summary: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

aiNews.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
aiNews.summary: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.
